headline: A compact command center for the Royals season

latest_prospect_update.name: Blake Mitchell
latest_prospect_update.note: Most obvious remaining minor-league prospect to track; catcher development and power/patience are the main signals. Recent line: .174 / .296 / .348.

nightly_recap: The Royals lost to the Minnesota Twins, KC 3, MIN 5. Jac Caglianone led the night, 2-3 | 2B, BB, RBI in the latest Royals game. Jac Caglianone supplied the loudest Royals contact at 111.6 mph.

player_of_game.name: Jac Caglianone
player_of_game.reason: 2-3 | 2B, BB, RBI in the latest Royals game.
